title: Windows controlled external test instructions
summary: Produce controlled external test instructions for the unsigned Windows unpacked directory build without signing, installer, updater, store upload or public release.
acceptance: Produces tester installation and run instructions for the unsigned unpacked Windows directory build
Documents scope, warnings, diagnostics, support collection, sandbox/preload boundaries and known M6 limitations
States non-goals clearly: no signing, installer, updater, store upload, public release, telemetry, accounts, crash upload or paid services
Verifies current build and desktop-shell smoke commands still support the instructions
Records Windows verdict as controlled external test only and does not broaden it

history.details: Created by WM-0098 M7 planning DAG; remains proposed until WM-0098 is verified, integrated and done.

Added M7 Windows controlled external test instructions for the unsigned unpacked directory build; documented run steps, support collection, sandbox/preload boundaries, known M6 blockers and non-goals; no signing, installer, store, telemetry, release, save-commitment or M8 work; required checks passed including build:desktop, desktop-shell e2e and quality.
verified: No blocking findings; acceptance evidence confirmed; build:desktop and desktop-shell e2e rerun with documented pnpm 11.8.0 path; scope remains unsigned controlled external test only.

Integrated verified Windows controlled external test instructions after independent reviewer confirmed unsigned controlled-test-only scope and no release/signing/store/telemetry/save/M8 work. Integration gates passed: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and pnpm quality.

objective: Make Windows controlled external testing reproducible and bounded by the reviewed M6 verdict.
forbiddenPaths: signed installer, updater, Steam/store package or public release upload
telemetry accounts paid services crash upload or hosted support service
broad filesystem bridge or arbitrary IPC
save schema changes unless separately approved
M8 task creation, promotion, claim, implementation or review
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: tester instructions can be mistaken for public release readiness; all copy must say controlled external test only.
Risk: packaging changes can cross into signing or installer work; those remain owner-gated.
File ownership is limited to desktop shell docs/smoke support and Windows external-test instruction reports.
ownerGate: Block on signing, installer, updater, store upload or public release
Block on new broad host bridge, arbitrary IPC or weakened Electron security boundaries
Block if instructions require final privacy, legal, telemetry, account, paid-service or save-compatibility commitments
m0M6RegressionCoverage: Preserve M6 Windows unsigned local-directory verdict
Run desktop build and desktop-shell smoke
Preserve M5 final hashes and benchmark thresholds
benchmarkImpact: No benchmark baseline change expected. Build/package size evidence may be recorded, but thresholds must not be weakened.
reviewRouting: client-engineer completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies instructions match the unsigned controlled-test verdict and no release/signing work occurred.
rollbackModel: Revert Windows instruction docs/shell support and WM-0103 reports; leave WM-0090/WM-0097 evidence intact.

sparkEligibility.reason: Windows external-test instructions touch platform packaging, security boundaries and owner-gated release language.

review.summary: No blocking findings; acceptance evidence confirmed; build:desktop and desktop-shell e2e rerun with documented pnpm 11.8.0 path; scope remains unsigned controlled external test only.

integration.summary: Integrated verified Windows controlled external test instructions after independent reviewer confirmed unsigned controlled-test-only scope and no release/signing/store/telemetry/save/M8 work. Integration gates passed: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and pnpm quality.
